backend/main.mo: Main canister actor implementing user profiles, access control, validation logic, and reward campaign structures with storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old vendor data to a new format by normalizing category text values.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a category selection UX feature to affected files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of various frontend files describing their roles and integrations across the app.
frontend/EXECUTION_PLAN.md: Step‑by‑step implementation plan outlining backend–frontend integration phases and completion status.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based styling defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML page loading the React application root and main script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring routes, layout, theme provider, and global modals for the full frontend.
frontend/src/components/AddDAppModal.tsx: Form modal for creating a new DApp, handling validation, logo upload, and submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard showing analytics, project stats, and access to revenue and reward management modals.
frontend/src/components/CreateRewardCamp: Modal for creating reward campaigns with type selection and reward amount handling before backend submission.
frontend/src/components/DAppCard.tsx: Displays a DApp card with views, clicks, and a launch button that tracks clicks and triggers onView.
Static feature grid highlighting analytics, payments, AI recommendations, and advertising capabilities.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing attribution and links to About, Docs, and Support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar handling authentication, theme toggle, mobile menu, and route navigation.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Marketing hero section introducing the platform with key feature callouts.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailDialo: Displays a dialog showing detailed order information by fetching orders and rendering status, IDs, amount, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Shows a modal for creating a user profile with validation for name and email and submits via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationsP: Generates AI-scored project recommendations based on analytics and displays the top entries with tracking for views and clicks.
frontend/src/components/RevenueDashboard: Renders revenue metrics and a table of per-project revenue and payouts using mock calculations.
frontend/src/components/RevenueShareConf: Modal for creating revenue share configurations, allowing participant management and validating total percentage before submission.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: Prompts admins to configure Stripe by entering a secret key and allowed countries, submitting via a mutation hook.
Input component allowing text entry or browser speech recognition, submitting cleaned input via a callback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/MyProduct: Displays vendor product list with loading, empty, and grid states, and links to add new products.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorCat: Manages category entry with validation, suggestion filtering, keyboard navigation, and add/remove logic.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOnb: Shows vendor onboarding steps and highlights incomplete steps, offering a button to add the first product.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Form to create a new product with validation, price conversion to e8s, and async submit via useCreateProduct.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Hook returning a debounced value that updates after a delay without changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth state, login/logout handling, identity loading, and context setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyVendorProducts.t: Filters all products to those owned by the logged-in vendor and returns them with loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, roles, reward campaigns, and other platform entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors, radii, and global element styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoveryHubPage.tsx: Displays trending, emerging, and leaderboard DApps using analytics-driven scoring with authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/GlobalDashboardPage.t: Renders a unified analytics dashboard with global metrics, mock stats, and authentication-gated content.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Shows a searchable, sortable DApp marketplace with analytics, admin tools, recommendations, and profile setup logic.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays authenticated users’ order history with status badges, loading states, and an order detail dialog.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Displays available reward campaigns, handles joining and completing campaigns, and enforces authentication before participation.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Provides a searchable product catalog with vendor filtering and allows authenticated users to place orders.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDirectoryPage.t: Lists public vendors with search, category filtering, sorting, and URL-synced filters.
frontend/src/pages/VendorPage.tsx: Manages vendor onboarding, profile editing, product management, and order handling for authenticated vendors.
frontend/src/pages/VendorStorePage.tsx: Shows a public vendor’s store with searchable products and lets authenticated users place orders.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: React page for viewing wallet balances and performing ICP/Stripe deposits and withdrawals with authentication checks and mutation handlers.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines frontend TypeScript interfaces for analytics, revenue sharing, wallets, vendors, products, and orders.
frontend/src/utils/categoryText.ts: Utility functions for normalizing, comparing, parsing, and filtering vendor category text.
frontend/src/utils/errors.ts: Converts various error shapes into readable error messages with fallbacks.
frontend/src/utils/profileValidation.ts: Validation helpers for profile name and email fields with backend-aligned constraints.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hashes, and sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/vendorDiscovery.ts: Helpers for searching, filtering, sorting vendors and extracting unique normalized categories.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending feature requests about vendor category improvements.
